actions.description: Re-ref Com On Rules, Calendar, and Operations of the House
Failed Concur In H Com Sub
Ref To Com On Rules and Operations of the Senate
Regular Message Received For Concurrence in H Com Sub
Re-ref Com On Pensions and Retirement
Re-ref to the Com on Rules, Calendar, and Operations of the House, if favorable, Finance, if favorable, Appropriations, if favorable, Pensions and Retirement
Serial Referral To Pensions and Retirement Stricken
Re-ref to the Com on Finance, if favorable, Appropriations, if favorable, Pensions and Retirement
Serial Referral To Pensions and Retirement Stricken
Ref to the Com on Appropriations, if favorable, Finance, if favorable, Pensions and Retirement
Re-ref Com On Pensions and Retirement and Aging
Reptd Fav Com Sub with Unengrossed Amend
Re-ref to Appropriations/Base Budget.  If fav, re-ref to Finance.  If fav, re-ref to Pensions and Retirement and Aging
Ref To Com On Rules and Operations of the Senate
